disclaimer: Proof-based automated slice only. Google Ads, Merchant Center, GSC performance, GA4 realtime, and policy state require authenticated dashboards.

homepageAudit.title: Resumora | Executive resume studio — ATS-safe, bilingual EN/FR

gbpOperatorTodo.hint: Yes — link to https://resumora.net/contact (or live booking URL). Match primary CTA on site.
Yes — scoped quotes aligned with /pricing; avoid unbounded promises.
Yes — primary delivery is remote; service area: online / worldwide plus any real local areas.
Yes — concierge intake; avoids walk-in mismatch with studio positioning.
Enable multilingual + EN/FR explicitly where GBP allows both.
List French; align with bilingual solution pages on resumora.net.
Categories + services: resume writer / career counselor taxonomy closest to region; services mirror /services + /solutions/*.
Include career coaching where offered (e.g. /solutions/career-coaching); do not over-claim outside scope.
Service area: worldwide/online; hours accurate; website UTM optional: ?utm_source=gmb&utm_medium=organic
Site: JSON-LD Organization/WebSite + factual GBP description; GSC sitemap; no keyword stuffing.
Reviews + owner replies; photos; Q&A; consistent NAP with site footer; no duplicate listings.

missingOptimizationPoints: No NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_* / NEXT_PUBLIC_ORG_SAME_AS in env — cross-channel parity with GBP social links unverified locally.
homepageAudit.disclaimer: This audit does not call Google Business Profile APIs or modify Maps. Apply attributes in GBP UI or Business Profile API after OAuth.

issues: NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID not set in this environment (GA4 snippet will not load in dev).
NEXT_PUBLIC_GSC_VERIFICATION not set (GSC HTML tag verification will not emit).
NEXT_PUBLIC_ORG_SAME_AS not set (JSON-LD sameAs may be empty).

seoAudit.disclaimer: No live connection to SE Ranking, NeuronWriter, LowFruits, or authenticated Google/Bing APIs from this script.

notes: SPF/DKIM/DMARC must be set at your DNS host (not in this repo). DKIM public key is generated in Google Admin > Apps > Google Workspace > Gmail > Authenticate email.
DMARC p=none is monitoring-only; move to quarantine/reject after monitoring.
Dashboard checks (ownership, Coverage, CWV, manual actions, impressions) require https://search.google.com/search-console — not available from this repo.
HTML meta google-site-verification present only proves deploy includes the tag; confirm property in GSC.
Realtime, conversions, cross-device, and DebugView require GA4 UI or Data API — not probed here.
Neon /api/analytics/track is complementary; it is not GA4.
If using GA4 via gtag only, GTM may be unnecessary; dual stacks can double-fire.
Tag Assistant / preview mode validates GTM in-browser — not automated here.
Account health, billing, policy, and delivery require ads.google.com — not available from this repo.
AW- in HTML suggests Ads tags; absence does not mean Ads is off (server-side or off-site).
Maps verification, review flow, and live Maps pack rank require operator checks + GBP UI.
Run: npm run resumora:gbp:audit — Neon: resumora:gbp:confirm after manual work.
SPF/DKIM/DMARC must be set at your DNS host (not in this repo). DKIM public key is generated in Google Admin > Apps > Google Workspace > Gmail > Authenticate email.
DMARC p=none is monitoring-only; move to quarantine/reject after monitoring.
Inbox placement and Gmail Postmaster require Google dashboards + seed tests.
No Merchant Center feed is defined in this audit; confirm in merchants.google.com if used.

notes: Indexing and duplicate URL issues: use GSC Coverage + URL Inspection.
Set GOOGLE_PAGESPEED_API_KEY for automated Lighthouse scores (Pagespeed Insights API).
Alternatively run Lighthouse locally or in CI.
Event consistency across Google vs BossMind requires worker wiring + GSC/GA exports to Neon — partial only.
Counts BossMind analytics_web_events only — not GA4 hit volume.
